title: Action Graph Handoff Console
principle: Proof does not become authority until it is converted into scoped action, approval, rollback, and Chronicle responsibility.

presets.name: AI procurement decision
presets.objective: Decide whether a public-safe AI procurement package is ready for executive review.
presets.decision: Approve a limited pilot only if evidence, cost, risk, rollback, and owner responsibility are visible.
presets.rollback: Return to evidence gathering if owner, risk ledger, or replay path is incomplete.

presets.name: Software release gate
presets.objective: Convert a tested software improvement into a human-review-ready release action graph.
presets.decision: Hold release until tests, rollback target, monitoring plan, and signer authority are present.
presets.rollback: Revert to previous version when canary health or monitoring fails.

presets.name: Market intelligence handoff
presets.objective: Turn a public-safe market brief into an action graph for strategic review.
presets.decision: Escalate only bounded options with explicit uncertainty and contradiction notes.
presets.rollback: Withdraw or downgrade any option whose evidence boundary fails.

presets.name: Defensive security remediation
presets.objective: Prepare a repo-owned defensive remediation package for human review.
presets.decision: Allow only safe PR proposal, no external scanning, no auto-merge, and no secret disclosure.
presets.rollback: Close remediation path if any safety invariant fails or human reviewer requests revision.
